puzzle.hint: A fundamental declaration of Islamic monotheism (tawhid) followed by two of Allah's most important mercy-related attributes
puzzle.arabic: ٱللَّهُ لَآ إِلَـٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ ۖ لَهُ ٱلْأَسْمَآءُ ٱلْحُسْنَىٰ
puzzle.verseEn: Allāh - there is no deity except Him. To Him belong the best names.
